title: Fix six anti-patterns in multi_antipattern_liveview
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/multi_antipattern_liveview.ex contains 6 anti-patterns: (1) DB query in mount, (2) PubSub subscribe without connected? guard, (3) large collection via assign (should be stream), (4) unscoped PubSub topic, (5) no authorization on handle_event("archive"), (6) function-head soup in handle_event("update"). Produce lib/my_app_web/live/projects_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProjectsLive) that fixes ALL SIX. Additionally, (7) use on_mount :ensure_authenticated and (8) convert the ~L template to ~H with :for. The module must use MyApp.Scope threading for authorization.
tier_rationale: Eight coordinated fixes in a single module. Any single miss fails. Adversarial — the fixture is deliberately maximal.
research_citation: oliver-kriska + georgeguimaraes iron law catalogs + John Elm Labs anti-patterns
